title: Grilled Honey Cinnamon Apple Wedges
description: A simple grilled dessert featuring apple wedges coated with honey, cinnamon, and oil
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: If using wooden skewers, soak them in water for 1 hour
Place apple wedges in a flat dish
Sprinkle cinnamon evenly over wedges
Drizzle honey evenly over wedges
Drizzle vegetable oil over wedges
Gently mix to coat all sides of the apple
Thread each apple wedge onto a skewer
Grill each cut side for 4-5 minutes or until grill marks appear

title: Grilled Honey Cinnamon Pineapple Spears
description: A beginner-friendly dessert recipe featuring grilled pineapple spears coated with honey and cinnamon
author: Atiba de Souza

ingredients.name: vegetable oil (do not use olive oil)

instructions.text: If using wooden skewers, soak in water for 1 hour
Place pineapple spears in a flat dish
Sprinkle cinnamon evenly over spears
Drizzle honey evenly over spears
Drizzle oil over spears
Gently mix to coat all sides of the pineapple
Skewer each pineapple piece
Grill on each side for 3-4 minutes until grill marks appear and darken
Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Grease and flour 10-inch cast iron pan (bakers pan spray with flour will also work well)
Whisk together all of the dry ingredients in a large bowl
In a separate bowl whisk the 2 eggs
To the eggs add and whisk together: 1. Milk 2. Vanilla extract 3. Butter
Add wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and fold to combine. Do not over mix.
Scrape all the batter into your cast iron pan evenly
Bake for 23 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean after sticking the middle of the cornbread

title: Sriracha Ketchup
description: A simple homemade condiment combining ketchup with sriracha heat
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Enjoy with fries, chicken, fish, or just about anything. Store in the fridge in an airtight container for up to a week.
Season fish with 1.5 tsp salt and 1 tsp black pepper
Mix all dry ingredients in a shallow long dish: 1. Flour 2. Corn meal 3. Onion powder 4. Thyme 5. Cayenne 6. Old bay
Heat a large frying pan over medium heat. Once the pan is hot add butter and oil.
Dredge swai filet in the breading one filet at a time.
Fry swai on each side for 3-4 minutes
Remove swai from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil
Season shrimp with jerk seasoning, thyme, Old Bay, salt, black pepper, and honey
Saute garlic for 2-3 minutes
Add shrimp to sauteed garlic and cook until they turn pink
Serve hot
Cut pineapple into 1/4 inch cubes
Cut mangoes into 1/4 inch cubes
Combine all ingredients and mix well
Chill overnight and serve cold
Melt butter and cool to 80-90 degrees
Whisk together dry ingredients: flour, baking powder, sugar, salt
Whisk eggs in separate bowl
Add milk and vanilla extract to eggs and whisk
Combine butter with egg mixture
Fold wet and dry ingredients together without overmixing
Scoop batter into waffle iron and cook until golden brown
Serve hot with desired toppings
Crack coconut and remove flesh from husk, reserving coconut water if possible
Chop coconut into thin strips
Blend coconut thoroughly with coconut water or 1.5 cups water
Strain and squeeze coconut milk from blended mixture
Add coconut milk, condensed milk, and evaporated milk to ice cream maker, mix thoroughly
Chill mixture for 2 hours
Follow ice cream maker's instructions

title: Easy 4 Ingredient No Knead Rolls
description: The best and easiest rolls you will ever make from scratch
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Add warm water, salt and yeast to a large bowl
Add all 6.5 cups of flour to the bowl
Mix with wooden spoon until no dry flour remains (3-5 minutes). Do not add water; continue mixing until absorbed
Cover dough with damp paper towels or kitchen towel; let rise 2-3 hours
Generously flour 2 baking sheets
Turn dough onto floured surface (will be sticky)
Divide dough into 2 equal parts with sharp knife
Continue dividing until you have 24 roughly equal-sized pieces
Generously flour hands
Pick up one dough portion
Stretch edges around to bottom/middle on all sides, rotating to smooth top
Place dough ball on floured baking sheet
Repeat with remaining dough, spacing 2 inches apart
Cover with damp paper towels; rest 40-45 minutes
Place pizza stone with cornmeal on center oven rack
Place roasting pan with 6-8 cups water on bottom rack
Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Transfer bread to pizza stone once water steams (space as desired)
Bake 15 minutes or until golden brown

title: Stewed Red Beans (Trinidad Style)
description: Stewed red beans and all beans are a staple in Caribbean cooking and meal prep.
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Chop carrots, cilantro (if fresh), parsley (if fresh), green onion, green pepper, and pumpkin as needed.
Saute onion and garlic in olive oil over medium heat for 5-7 minutes until onions are translucent.
Drain and rinse canned beans.
Add beans, bouillon cube, and water to sauteed onions and garlic.
Add all chopped seasonings and stir well.
Add scotch bonnet pepper whole; do not stir until removal.
Simmer over medium-low to medium heat for 15 minutes until carrots and pumpkin are cooked.
Remove scotch bonnet pepper before serving.

title: Italian Herb Sourdough Discard Crackers
description: An easy snack that will use up your sourdough discard. You may never buy store-bought crackers again!
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 325 degrees
Parchment or foil line a baking sheet and spray with olive oil
Melt and cool 2 tablespoons of butter
Combine sourdough discard, butter, herb blend, and 1/2 teaspoon of salt
Spread mixture thinly over greased and lined baking sheet
Bake for 10 minutes
Remove from oven, score and fork crackers, sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon of salt
Bake for additional 23 minutes or until golden
Remove from oven and transfer parchment/foil with crackers to cooling rack immediately
Pre-heat your oven to 400 degrees.
In a small bowl mix together: brown sugar, flour, and cold butter until crumbly. Cover and place in the refrigerator or freezer.
In another bowl whisk together: egg, vanilla extract, melted butter, and grated orange peel.
Gently fold in your sourdough starter until blended.
In a large bowl whisk together: sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and flour.
Add the bowl of wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until everything is just combined.
Add the cranberries and apples and fold until blended.
Evenly divide the batter among the cavities of a paper lined muffin tin. Sprinkle the tops with the streusel.
Bake the muffins for 16 to 20 minutes, until a toothpick comes out clean. Let the muffins cool in the pan for 5 minutes. Let them cool completely in a wire rack.

title: 20 min Sourdough Pancakes
description: Quick sourdough discard pancake recipe ready in 20 minutes
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Whisk together flour, baking powder, soda, sugar and salt in a large bowl.
Add sourdough starter, vanilla extract, butter, egg, and milk; whisk until smooth.
Heat griddle or skillet to 325 degrees F and grease with cooking spray or butter.
Pour 1/4 cup batter onto griddle; cook until bubbles form on top, then flip.
Cook additional 1-2 minutes until golden.
Serve with maple syrup or honey.
Preheat oven to 450 Degrees
Foil line and grease a cookie sheet
In a large bowl whisk together all Dry Ingredients (flour, baking powder, sugar and salt)
Measure out milk and crack the egg and set aside
Grate the butter with a cheese grater.
Combine dry ingredients, milk, butter, and egg and mix with a wooden spoon to combine all the flour.
Mix until a solid dough ball is formed. Typically takes 3-4 minutes of mixing
Dump dough ball onto a floured surface and roll out to 1/2 inch thick with a rolling pin
Cut out biscuit shapes using a cookie cutter or small glass
Place biscuits 1 inch apart on foil-lined and greased cookie sheet
Bake 10 min or until tops of biscuits are golden brown
Preheat oven to 450 degrees
Wash salmon in lemon juice and place on a greased foil-lined tray
Sprinkle seasoning on top of the fish in this order: 1. Salt 2. Black pepper 3. Onion Powder 4. Garlic Powder 5. Italian 6. Parsley 7. Oregano 8. Thyme 9. Rosemary
Place at least 1 slice of lemon on each filet.
Slice the butter thinly and arrange on the fish. There is not much science on how to do this.

Thin Fillet (under 1 inch) - Bake 9 min at 450 degrees and then an additional 3 minutes on Broil. Thick Fillet - Bake 12 min at 450 degrees and then an additional 4 minutes on Broil. 1 inch thick steaks - Bake 12 min at 450 degrees and then an additional 4 minutes on Broil

title: Crispy Air Fried Zucchini Fries
description: A super simple way to get kids to eat their vegetables that is still healthy!
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Cut zucchini to the desired size. Typically cut zucchini into 16 pieces.
In a flat container wide enough to hold at least 1 zucchini fry beat the 3 eggs to make an egg wash.
Add all other ingredients together to make the breading for your fries.
Dip each fry into the egg wash and then into breading coating all sides of the fry. Remove from breading and place on air fryer tray. Spray with olive oil before frying.
Air Fry at 400 degrees for 15 minutes.

title: Broiled Sweet Thai Chili Salmon and Spinach
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Before seasoning the salmon, bring 3 quarts of water to a boil. Add vermicelli and a pinch of salt. Boil for 9 minutes and drain.
Line a baking sheet with foil and spray with cooking spray. Place fresh spinach no more than 1 inch thick, season with all dry ingredients, and drizzle with olive oil.
Place salmon on top of spinach and season with dry ingredients. Place butter pats 2 inches apart. Broil skin-side down for 30 seconds, then flip and cook 1 minute.
Bake at 450 degrees F for 9 minutes, then broil for 3 minutes.
While turning oven to broil, heat a large pan over medium heat. Add butter, cooking wine, and mirin, stirring to mix. Once bubbling, add sweet chili and stir constantly until fish is added.
Remove fish from oven and place in pan with glaze, seasoned-side down. Turn pan to low heat and allow 30 seconds. Turn fish over and sit for 1 minute in glaze.
Place vermicelli in center of plate. Add spinach portion on top. Top with salmon fillet, seasoned-side up, and add additional glaze as desired.

title: Crispy Chunky Granola
description: A picky granola lover's dream with big chunks, nuts, fruit, seeds, and customizable mix-ins.
author: Atiba de Souza

ingredients.name: mixed nuts, seeds, berries, and flax

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 325 degrees F
Combine wet ingredients and spices in small saucepan; heat over low 3-5 minutes until warm, not hot
Add oats to large bowl
Mix flour on top of oats to coat thoroughly
Add dried fruit and nut mixture to bowl
Pour liquid ingredients over dry mixture and stir thoroughly
Line 2 baking sheets with parchment; divide granola equally, packing tightly to no more than 0.5 inch height
Bake 25 minutes at 325 degrees F until golden; check every 5 minutes if needed
Cool on rack 15-20 minutes, then break into chunks
Return to baking sheet, drizzle with 0.5 cup honey, bake 10 minutes at 325 degrees F; allow full cooling before serving

ingredients.name: sugar (used to balance the heat of the chipotle pepper)
water or low sodium chicken broth

instructions.text: Add all ingredients to a large stockpot over medium-high heat. Once the liquid starts to bubble turn the temperature down to a medium-low and allow the pot to simmer. Simmer for 1 hour or until chicken is tender and breaks apart easily. CWA Note: Heat tolerance is a big thing with this dish. The recipe calls for 1 chipotle pepper, however, you can use as many or as few peppers as you like. To be honest with you, I typically add 3-4 and remove all of them within the first 20 min of cooking. This gives me flavor and not all the heat.

After an hour of simmering on medium-low heat, Remove the Chipotle pepper. CWA Note: this is the appropriate time to taste and adjust the flavor of your Tinga. If your tinga is too spicy add 2 tablespoons of sugar.

Remove all chicken from the pot and place in a large bowl, for me, I never get every piece of chicken out because some break apart and that's ok. With 2 forks gently pull apart and shred all the chicken. CWA Note: If some of the chicken is not breaking apart as you remove it from the pot then it has not cooked long enough. Let the pot simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes and try again.
Using a blender, pulse blend approximately 60-70 percent of the liquid in your pan.
Add the chicken and blended liquid back to your pan and mix all of it together and simmer on low for 10-15 min.

title: The Legit Jamaican Coco Bread Recipe
author: Atiba de Souza

instructions.text: Melt and cool 4 tablespoons of butter
In a large bowl combine egg, coconut milk, yeast, salt, sugar and 4 tablespoons of butter
Add 4 cups of flour to wet ingredients 1 cup at a time. Mix to combine and incorporate all the flour. The mixture should start to become solid but still very moist and sticky.
Turn the dough out on a floured surface and gently knead for 3-4 minutes. The dough ball will still be very soft but not sticky to the touch.
Place dough in a lightly greased bowl and cover with a kitchen towel or moist paper towels for 90 minutes.
Return the dough to a floured surface and divide it into 12 pieces.
Roll each dough ball out to approximately 1/8 inch thick. Brush the dough with butter then fold the dough circle in half. Then brush top with butter. Place coco bread on a lined or greased tray.
Allow coco bread to rest for 25 minutes
Pre-heat oven to 375 degrees
Bake for 20 minutes
